Video.summary: We are finally able to reveal the fascinating truths about ancient North America.
Video.title: The Unknown Story of Ancient North America

Image.alt: The Unknown Story of Ancient North America
The Unknown Story of Ancient North America
The Unknown Story of Ancient North America

Video.summary: DNA evidence points to Asia as the origin of all human migration to North America.
Video.title: The First Human Migrations to the Americas

Image.alt: The First Human Migrations to the Americas
The First Human Migrations to the Americas
The First Human Migrations to the Americas

Video.summary: Explore Clovis, the very first American culture.
Video.title: Clovis Man: America's First Culture

Image.alt: Clovis Man: America's First Culture
Clovis Man: America's First Culture
Clovis Man: America's First Culture

Video.summary: Better understand why some Paleo-Indian groups developed hunting and gathering culture.
Video.title: The Archaic Period: Diversity Begins

Image.alt: The Archaic Period: Diversity Begins
The Archaic Period: Diversity Begins
The Archaic Period: Diversity Begins

Video.summary: See how, peoples of North America developed corn agriculture, permanent houses and metallurgy.
Video.title: Late Archaic Innovations

Image.alt: Late Archaic Innovations
Late Archaic Innovations
Late Archaic Innovations

Video.summary: While most North Americans were nomadic, see how a group of ancient people developed a planned community.
Video.title: Poverty Point: North America's First City

Image.alt: Poverty Point: North America's First City
Poverty Point: North America's First City
Poverty Point: North America's First City

Video.summary: Dr. Barnhart takes you on a whirlwind tour of important places, civilizations, and events in Mesoamerica.
Video.grandparentTitle: Maya to Aztec: Ancient Mesoamerica Revealed
Video.title: The Maya, Aztecs, and Mesoamerica

Image.alt: The Maya, Aztecs, and Mesoamerica
The Maya, Aztecs, and Mesoamerica
The Maya, Aztecs, and Mesoamerica

Video.summary: Here, hear how the Olmec were discovered, and investigate three intriguing sites where they lived.
Video.grandparentTitle: Maya to Aztec: Ancient Mesoamerica Revealed
Video.title: Olmec Civilization Emerges

Image.alt: Olmec Civilization Emerges
Olmec Civilization Emerges
Olmec Civilization Emerges

Video.summary: Start your adventures in the world of beer with a step-by-step look at the best way to taste beer.
Video.grandparentTitle: The World of Beer: Tastes of History, Science, and Culture
Video.title: Beer Tasting: From Helles to Lambics

Image.alt: Beer Tasting: From Helles to Lambics
Beer Tasting: From Helles to Lambics
Beer Tasting: From Helles to Lambics

Video.summary: Dive into ancient history and archaeology as seen through the lens of beer.
Video.grandparentTitle: The World of Beer: Tastes of History, Science, and Culture
Video.title: Beer Archaeology: Civilization and Ancient Ale

Image.alt: Beer Archaeology: Civilization and Ancient Ale
Beer Archaeology: Civilization and Ancient Ale
Beer Archaeology: Civilization and Ancient Ale

Video.summary: Plunge into the fascinating science of yeast and the microbiology that drives brewing.
Video.grandparentTitle: The World of Beer: Tastes of History, Science, and Culture
Video.title: Beer Biology: Yeast, Fermenting, and Saisons

Image.alt: Beer Biology: Yeast, Fermenting, and Saisons
Beer Biology: Yeast, Fermenting, and Saisons
Beer Biology: Yeast, Fermenting, and Saisons

Video.summary: Beer is a thoroughly agricultural product which emerged as humans began to congregate in urban civilizations.
Video.grandparentTitle: The World of Beer: Tastes of History, Science, and Culture
Video.title: Beer Botany: Barley, Hops, and IPAs

Image.alt: Beer Botany: Barley, Hops, and IPAs
Beer Botany: Barley, Hops, and IPAs
Beer Botany: Barley, Hops, and IPAs

Video.summary: Explore how some beer styles powerfully evoke a sense of place with every sip.
Video.grandparentTitle: The World of Beer: Tastes of History, Science, and Culture
Video.title: Beer Geography: Terroir, Caves, and Guinness

Image.alt: Beer Geography: Terroir, Caves, and Guinness
Beer Geography: Terroir, Caves, and Guinness

Video.summary: Learn about the critical roles religion and ritual have played in shaping our beer tastes.
Video.grandparentTitle: The World of Beer: Tastes of History, Science, and Culture
Video.title: Beer and Religion: Monks, Bocks, and Trappists

Image.alt: Beer and Religion: Monks, Bocks, and Trappists
Beer and Religion: Monks, Bocks, and Trappists

Video.summary: Here, investigate some ancient and modern legends surrounding beer.
Video.grandparentTitle: The World of Beer: Tastes of History, Science, and Culture

Image.alt: Beer Legends: Myths, Witches, and Vikings
Beer Legends: Myths, Witches, and Vikings

Video.summary: Poke your head inside taverns, pubs, inns, and other places where beer has brought people together for thousands of years.

Video.summary: Consider what the occult really is and how occult practices seek to alter our everyday perspective.
Video.title: What Is the Occult?

Image.alt: What Is the Occult?
What Is the Occult?

Video.summary: Consider these various 'others' and their role in cultures around the world.
Video.title: Fauns, Fairies, and Djinn

Video.title: The Christmas Tree and Other Rituals

Video.summary: Creatures like vampires and zombies are older and more interesting than popular culture suggests.
